DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated door is verified closed, latched and, if applicable, locked before each departure.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Before each flight, verify that the door associated with the inoperative indication system is closed, latched and, if applicable, locked (AMM DDG 52-71-01).

Note.Para: If a Passenger Entry Door, Aft Cargo Door or Forward Cargo Door alert level message is displayed without the associated status message after the door is closed, latched and locked, the airplane should not be dispatched until the message is resolved. The Bulk Cargo Door, Aft E/E Access Door, Flight Deck Overhead Door, Forward Access Door and the Forward E/E Access Door are not included in this condition.

ListItem.Para: For Passenger Entry Doors:
Set EPAS safety switch to SAFE.
Set door mode select handle to disarmed/manual (green band) position.
Rotate the inside door handle to the open position. Open door slightly.
Close door and rotate door handle to closed position.
Remove the closed/latched visual indicator access panel cover on the forward doorway liner.
Check that the latched triangle is aligned with the closed/latched indicator (see placard affixed to the access panel cover).
Reinstall the access panel cover.
Remove the locked visual indicator access panel cover on the door main handle cover.
Check that the locked triangle is aligned with the locked indicator (see placard affixed to the access panel cover).
Reinstall the access panel cover.
Check that the outside skin of the door is aligned and faired with the surrounding body skin.
Check that the vent door is fully closed.
Set EPAS safety switch to NORMAL.
For Flight Deck Overhead Door:
Open the overhead door from the inside.
Remove the acoustic pad.
While holding the door, turn the handle to the OPEN position.
Move the door down and inboard.
Close the overhead door from the inside.
Move the door upward and outboard until the door touches the door jamb.
Turn the handle to the fully latched position.
Check that handle markings are aligned with LATCHED markings.
Attach the acoustic pad.
For Forward Cargo Door and Aft Cargo Door:
Close, latch and lock the affected door using normal procedures.
Check that the door skin is aligned and faired with the fuselage skin.
Rotate the lock handle to the open position.
Check that the vent door is open.
Rotate the lock handle to the closed position.
Check that the lock handle lever and trigger are faired with the door skin.
Check that the vent door is fully closed.
Check that the lock triangle tip and the latch triangle tip are visible in all 5 view ports.
For Bulk Cargo Door:
Open and then close bulk cargo door using normal procedures.
Check that the door skin is aligned and faired with the fuselage skin.
Check that the latch handle is fully closed and faired with the door skin.
Push on the door to verify it is latched.
For Aft Electrical Equipment (EE) Bay Access door:
Open the Wing-To-Body Fairing (WTBF) Aft EE Bay Access door.
Open and then close the Aft EE Bay Access door.
Check that the Aft EE Bay Access door external handle is in the fully closed position.
Push on the door to verify it is latched.
Close the WTBF Aft EE Bay Access door.
Check that the WTBF door flags are closed.
Check that the outside skin of the WTBF Aft EE Bay Access door is aligned and faired with the fuselage skin.
Check that the WTBF Aft EE Bay Access door latch handle is fully closed and faired with the door skin.
Push on the WTBF Aft EE Bay Access door to verify it is latched.
For Forward Access Door and Forward Electrical Equipment (EE) Access Door:
Open and then close the access door.
Check that the outside skin of the door is aligned and faired with the fuselage skin.
Check that the latch handle is fully closed and faired with the door skin.
Push on the door to verify it is latched.

OperationNote.Para: If a Passenger Entry Door, Aft Cargo Door or Forward Cargo Door alert level message is displayed without the associated status message after the door is closed, latched and locked, the airplane should not be dispatched until the message is resolved. The Bulk Cargo Door, Aft EE Access Door, Flight Deck Overhead Door, Forward Access Door and the Forward EE Access Door are not included in this condition.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated passenger entry door indication system operates normally.
